title: Julie’s Roasted Tomato Soup
ingredients: 2 28 oz. cans chopped tomatoes, drained well, reserve juice
Kosher salt and fresh ground black pepper
1 ½ small to medium onion, chopped
2 cups chicken broth or vegetable broth
instructions: Place the strained, chopped tomatoes on a baking pan lined with aluminum foil.  Drizzle with EVOO, sprinkle with kosher salt and pepper.  Place in 425 degree oven for 18-20 minutes.

In large saucepan, place 2-3 tb. EVOO.  Stir in chopped vegetables.  Cook until soft, about 15 minutes.  Add the reserved tomato juice, roasted tomatoes, broth, bay leaves, and basil.  Simmer until vegetables are very soft, about 20 minutes.  Puree with hand immersion blender until smooth.  Add butter (optional) and cream.  Adjust seasonings as needed.

Another way to serve this is to make the soup a little thicker and serve in a fondue pot. Make grilled cheese sandwiches with good crusty bread, cut into cubes, and serve the tomato soup/grilled cheese sandwich cubes as an appetizer.
